get.description: HTML shell — no auth on the page itself; JS handles session + data fetch.
List all API keys for the current user (including revoked).

schema.title: Response List Api Keys V1 Api Keys Get

post.description:
Create a new API key.

The full key is returned only once in this response.
Store it securely - it cannot be retrieved again.

delete.description:
Revoke an API key (soft-delete).

Idempotent: revoking an already-revoked key returns success.

schema.title: Response Revoke Api Key V1 Api Keys  Key Id  Delete

post.description:
Revoke the current JWT token (server-side blocklist).

Note: In-memory blocklist — effective only on this Cloud Run instance.
Full cross-instance revocation requires a shared store (future enhancement).

get.description: Return current user info + accessible client slugs.

post.description: Search competitor ads across Foreplay and Adyntel.
Search for creators across TikTok, YouTube, and content platforms.

get.description: Get all evaluations for an evolution campaign.

schema.title: Response Get Campaign Evaluations V1 Evaluation Campaign  Campaign Id  Get

post.description: Run session-time critique criteria through the trusted judge stack.
post.summary: Run trusted judge execution for evolvable session critique

post.description:
Run full 4-layer evaluation for a domain.

Returns domain_score + numbered dimension scores (no names — anti-gaming).

get.description: Get full evaluation details including all 32 dimension scores, reasoning, evidence.

get.description: List sessions within the caller's scope.

schema.title: Response List Sessions V1 Sessions Get

post.description:
Create a session (or return existing running one for this client).

Accepts either client_id (UUID) or client_slug (human-readable) — slug is
convenience for the CLI, which doesn't know client UUIDs.

schema.title: Response Create Session V1 Sessions Post
Response Get Session V1 Sessions  Session Id  Get

patch.description: Complete a running session with summary.

schema.title: Response Complete Session V1 Sessions  Session Id  Patch
Response Get Actions V1 Sessions  Session Id  Actions Get

post.description: Log an action to a session.

schema.title: Response Log Action V1 Sessions  Session Id  Actions Post
Response Get Iterations V1 Sessions  Session Id  Iterations Get

post.description: Log an iteration. Large payloads go to R2 when configured, Postgres otherwise.

schema.title: Response Log Iteration V1 Sessions  Session Id  Iterations Post

post.description: Upload session transcript (exempt from 1MB body limit, 15MB max).

schema.title: Response Upload Transcript V1 Sessions  Session Id  Transcript Post
